title: Blank Oregon rental application (4/6/22)
html:
TL;DR

  • 60+ KB of an empty Oregon rental application template (NOT for City of Portland).
  • No applicant data — fields are all underscores; the only ink is the form's printed metadata: owner/agent Jeffrey Lerch, 41837 Larwood Drive, Scio OR 97374 (this is the printed property-management info, not Yahir's).
  • $25 screening fee preprinted; smoking policy = prohibited entire premises.
  • Effectively a junk doc — pasted-form artifact from a 2022 housing search (Corvallis-era) but contains zero personal content.

Notes

This is a Google Docs paste of a printable PDF rental application — the body is rows of ____________________ fill-ins. Useful only as a date-stamp that Yahir was in housing-application mode in early April 2022. The named owner/agent is a third-party property manager and is preserved here only because it appears as preprinted form text, not as personal-information disclosure. No further extraction warranted; flagged in log as a known-blank doc.

Connections

  • corvallis or · housing applications 2022
